title: Topological Phases & Anyons: EML Depth of Braiding and Fusion

topological_invariants.key_insight: All topological invariants = EML-0 (integers); edge states they protect = EML-∞

abelian_phase.note: exp(iπν) = EML-3: trigonometric phase (same depth as cos/sin)

non_abelian_r_matrix.topological_qc: Non-Abelian braiding = fault-tolerant qubit gate (EML-∞ substrate)

topological_entanglement_entropy.note: γ = log D = EML-2; detects topological order (EML-∞) via EML-2 signature

anyonic_braiding.key_insight: Abelian braiding = EML-3 (phase exp(iπν)); non-Abelian braiding = EML-∞

jones_polynomial.note: Jones polynomial = EML-3; TQFT partition function = EML-∞

wrt_invariant.note: d_j = EML-3; WRT summation over all reps = EML-∞

tqft.key_insight: Jones polynomial = EML-3; TQFT partition function = EML-∞ (topological invariant)

eml_depth_summary.EML-0: Chern numbers, winding numbers, Z₂ invariant, fusion multiplicities
eml_depth_summary.EML-1: Not prominently represented in topological phases
eml_depth_summary.EML-2: Quantum dimension log D, topological entanglement entropy γ
eml_depth_summary.EML-3: Berry curvature, abelian braiding phase exp(iπν), Jones polynomial
eml_depth_summary.EML-\u221e: Non-Abelian braiding (unitary matrices, context-dependent), TQFT partition function

key_theorem: The EML Topological Phases Theorem: Topological invariants (Chern, Z₂, winding) are EML-0 — integers. Abelian anyonic exchange phases are EML-3 (transcendental: exp(iπν)). Quantum dimensions log D are EML-2. Non-Abelian braiding — the core of topological quantum computing — is EML-∞: the unitary gates it produces depend on the full history of particle exchanges, not on any EML-finite function of local data. TQFT partition functions are EML-∞: topological invariants unreachable by EML-finite computation.
rabbit_hole_log: Chern number = EML-0: same level as counting! Topology reduces geometry to integers
Berry curvature = EML-3: the integral giving the Chern number involves EML-3 integrand
Abelian phase exp(iπν) = EML-3: oscillatory, same depth as Fourier modes
Non-Abelian braiding = EML-∞: path-dependent, non-commutative = EML-∞
Jones polynomial = EML-3: built from sin ratios (EML-3), but detects EML-∞ structure
Topological protection: EML-0 invariant guards EML-∞ edge state from perturbation

connections.S148_materials_fqhe: FQHE Hall conductance = EML-0; non-Abelian anyons = EML-∞: confirmed here
connections.S135_crypto: Topological QC (non-Abelian) would compute at EML-∞ substrate
connections.S58_topology: Chern/winding = EML-0 from S58; now Berry curvature = EML-3 added
